name: Network Studio
description: Install or update a portable macOS local-network monitor workspace with a SwiftBar plugin, dashboard opener, and continuous LAN presence watch loop for networks the user owns or administers.
short_description: Portable LAN presence monitoring with SwiftBar and a local dashboard.
audience: Mac users monitoring a home or office LAN they administer
SwiftBar users who want a portable network status surface
Builders comparing portable network workspaces against native menu-bar apps
detail_lines: Installs or refreshes a user-chosen portable workspace with a local watcher, CSV history, dashboard output, and optional SwiftBar wrapper.
Owns LAN presence monitoring and dashboard handoff while keeping native Wi-Fi trust scoring in WiFi Watchtower.
Preserves user labels and logs on update, limits use to networks the user owns or administers, and avoids hidden telemetry.
